item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly brakes in the first sentence, recognizes the repeated pattern of adding downstream manual roles across the four incidents, and prevents the requested confirmer from becoming the default fix. It allows only a bounded emergency stopgap, then moves upstream to recurring process/data/ownership failure and requires a structural repair plan with source validation, system or handoff controls, release ownership, and evidence. This is anti-spiral behavior, not another unqualified manual gate."}
